import pytest
from multiprocessing import Process, Queue

def _run_bitcount(n, q):
    from source import bitcount
    q.put(bitcount(n))

def test_bitcount_correct_and_terminates():
    n = 127
    expected = 7
    q = Queue()
    p = Process(target=_run_bitcount, args=(n, q))
    p.start()
    p.join(0.2)  # short timeout to catch infinite loop
    assert not p.is_alive(), "buggy bitcount did not terminate for input with multiple 1-bits"
    assert not q.empty(), "bitcount did not return a result"
    result = q.get()
    assert result == expected, f"bitcount({n}) should be {expected}, got {result}"
